title: Political Discourse
description: Vocabulary for civic life: policy, electorate, reform, bipartisan, accountability.
summary_pt_br: Linguagem política equilibrada: 'Some argue', 'Critics contend', 'A more nuanced view'.

scenes.subtitle_en: Vocabulary for civic life: policy, electorate, reform, bipartisan, accountability.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Linguagem política equilibrada: 'Some argue', 'Critics contend', 'A more nuanced view'.

scenes.text_en: Vocabulary for civic life: policy, electorate, reform, bipartisan, accountability. Today's focus: political discourse. Some argue that the new policy strengthens democracy.
scenes.text_pt: Linguagem política equilibrada: 'Some argue', 'Critics contend', 'A more nuanced view'. Foco de hoje: political discourse. Alguns argumentam que a política nova fortalece a democracia.

scenes.title: Political Discourse
scenes.body_en: Hedged statements for balanced discussion: 'Some argue that...', 'Critics contend...', 'A more nuanced view holds that...'
scenes.body_pt: Linguagem política equilibrada: 'Some argue', 'Critics contend', 'A more nuanced view'.

examples.en: Some argue that the new policy strengthens democracy.
examples.pt: Alguns argumentam que a política nova fortalece a democracia.

examples.en: Critics contend that reform has been too slow.
examples.pt: Críticos sustentam que a reforma foi lenta demais.

examples.en: A more nuanced view holds that both sides share blame.
examples.pt: Uma visão mais matizada sustenta que os dois lados têm culpa.

exercise.question: Complete: "Some argue that the new policy ___ democracy."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Some argue that the new policy strengthens democracy."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Alguns argumentam que a política nova fortalece a democracia.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Critics contend that reform has been too slow.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Critics contend that reform has been too slow."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Críticos sustentam que a reforma foi lenta demais.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Political Discourse — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre political discourse. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Describe the current policy debate calmly.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Some argue the reform helps low-income families.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Critics contend the rollout has been too slow.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How would you offer a nuanced view?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: A more nuanced view sees benefits and flaws.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, if the electorate demands accountability.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What single word matters most in politics?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Democracy lives on nuance, not volume.

scenes.title: The dinner-table debate
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize three views expressed. Use at least three political vocabulary words.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the long dinner table, three generations debated the most recent policy announcement.

paragraphs.speaker: Uncle
paragraphs.en: Some argue that the reform finally modernizes our healthcare system for the better.

paragraphs.speaker: Aunt
paragraphs.en: Critics contend that implementation has been chaotic and leaves the poorest behind entirely.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: A more nuanced view would grant that the intent was right but the execution was incomplete.

paragraphs.speaker: Young cousin
paragraphs.en: Accountability matters more than party loyalty — that lesson should cross every dinner table.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Political English, Kumar believed, is practiced in kitchens long before it enters parliaments.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Political Discourse". Vocabulary for civic life: policy, electorate, reform, bipartisan, accountability. Some argue that the new policy strengthens democracy. Critics contend that reform has been too slow. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Political Discourse". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: BBC News · Learning English
sources.pt_hint: Análise de notícias reais da BBC.

sources.label: TED Talks with subtitles
sources.pt_hint: Palestras reais com legenda — ouça, leia, repita.

sources.label: Cambridge Dictionary · thesaurus
sources.pt_hint: Sinônimos com exemplos — essencial em B2+.
